crops.name: Spacetatoes
crops.description: The foundational staple. Highly resilient.

crops.name: Lunar Carrots
crops.description: Deep violet neon roots that grow inverted.

crops.name: Moon Wheat
crops.description: Luminescent golden stalks.

crops.name: Terran Radishes
crops.description: Extremely rapid growth. Ideal for emergencies.

crops.name: Hydro-Lettuce
crops.description: Translucent leafy greens. Guzzles water.

crops.name: Bio-Mash Pods
crops.description: Rupture into high-nitrogen mulch when harvested.

crops.name: Fiber-Kelp
crops.description: Expands aggressively. Forms dense foliage blocks.

crops.name: Nitrate Squash
crops.description: Hollow inedible rind. Perfect for compost.

crops.name: Pulp-Gourd
crops.description: Fleshy gourds that turn to mulch when cut.

crops.name: Sludge-Fern
crops.description: Thrives on mechanical runoff.

crops.name: Glow-Stalks
crops.description: Radiates electric green. Needs perfect hydration.

crops.name: Neon Berries
crops.description: Decay rapidly if left unharvested for one week.

crops.name: Glass-Fronds
crops.description: Transparent crystalline leaves. Premium corporate decor.

crops.name: Crystalline Beans
crops.description: Calcified pods. Mimic precious gem growths.

crops.name: Nebula Melons
crops.description: Heavy fruits with shifting neon color bands.

crops.name: Copper-Root
crops.description: Concentrates raw Metals into root nodules.

crops.name: Silicon Shoots
crops.description: Processes moon sand into glass matrices.

crops.name: Battery-Bulbs
crops.description: Provide instant power spikes upon harvest.

crops.name: Protocol Peas
crops.description: Rigid spheres used as low-grade Components.

crops.name: Matrix Moss
crops.description: Slowest growing. Immense fortune in Star-Scrip.

relay_technician.name: Specialist Kovacs
rant_topics: the injustice of the posting system
the last supply ship crew who ignored him
the view from the relay window
the silence of space (he finds it peaceful)
his detailed ship captain fantasy scenarios
radio_transmissions: Colony Broadcast: Week {week} agricultural report filed. Keep those calories coming.
STATIC... did anyone else pick up that signal from sector 7?
Corporate memo: All lunar operations are reminded that compost storage quotas apply.
Kovacs here. Just so everyone knows, I passed my captain's exam. Again. For the third time.
Weather advisory: Increased micrometeorite activity. Check dome seals.
Colony update: Food stores at {colony_food_percent}%. Your deliveries are appreciated.
Relay broadcasting: The stars are particularly clear tonight. Not that anyone asked.
Corporate: Reminder that raid insurance does NOT cover structural negligence.
Kovacs personal log - open channel apparently: If anyone needs a highly qualified captain...
Colony celebrates: A new generation born this week. They'll need those calories.
Security advisory: Lunar fauna activity increasing in your sector. Brace for raid.
Kovacs: Management denied my transfer request. Again. Logging formal protest. Again.
relay_technician.opening_transmission: New operator confirmed. I'm Specialist Kovacs, your relay contact on MF-7. The previous farmer left in a hurry — something about the fauna. Didn't elaborate. Your starting supplies were dropped this morning. First scheduled pickup is Week 4. Don't be late. I have other things to do. — Kovacs

greeting_neutral: Kovacs. I was in the middle of something.
greeting_happy: MF-7. I'll admit, things could be worse today.
Relay MF-7. You caught me in a reasonable mood.
after_ask_wellbeing: Fine. Cafeteria ran out of the decent coffee again. But fine.
Surviving. The posting review board denied my transfer. Again. But fine.
You know what, that's... actually a reasonable question. I'm managing.
after_compliment_grooming: ...thank you. I do maintain standards out here. Someone has to.
I appreciate that. It's not easy keeping a pressed uniform on a relay station.
Finally. Someone notices. The last three operators never once acknowledged the effort.
after_captain_dream: Since you asked — I scored 97th percentile on the navigation exam. 97th. And they put me here. Answering calls from moon farmers.
You want to know about that? Most people don't ask. I had a full deep-space posting lined up. Politics. That's all I'll say.
It's fine. I've filed the appeals. All twelve of them. One will land eventually.
after_listen_rant: ...anyway. That's enough of that. What do you actually need.
I appreciate you letting me finish. Most operators just hang up.
Right. Sorry. It builds up out here.
after_rush_order: A RUSH order. Do you have any idea what that does to my scheduling.
Fine. FINE. But this goes in my log. And your pricing reflects my inconvenience.
Rush processed. You're welcome. My mood does not thank you.
after_dismissive: Charming. I'll remember that next time you need a favor.
Right. Well. I'll just add that to the list.
after_share_news: Hm. That's actually mildly interesting. Carry on.
I see. The moon farming life. Riveting.
Sure. Yes. Thanks for the update on your vegetables.
ship_window_reminder: Pickup is Week {week}. Have your cargo ready or I'm leaving without it. I have a schedule.
Reminder: ship window opens Week {week}. Don't come crying to me if your silos are empty. — Kovacs
Week {week} pickup approaching. I'll be overhead at the scheduled time. Whether you're ready is your problem.
ship_confirmed: Cargo received. {volume}m³ logged. Star-Scrip transfer processing. Next window: Week {next_week}.
Shipment away. {volume}m³. You'll see the scrip next cycle. Try to have more next time.
Received. {volume}m³. Logged. Transferred. I've filed the manifest. You're welcome.
rush_ship_confirmed: Rush shipment processed. {volume}m³. The surcharge reflects my feelings about this. — Kovacs
Done. Rush fee applied. I hope whatever was so urgent was worth it.
no_cargo: You called me up here with an empty manifest. I have noted this in my personal log.
Nothing to ship. Wasted trip. I'm adjusting my opinion of you accordingly.
contract_turnin: Contract fulfilled. {crop} delivery confirmed — {amount} units. Bonus scrip transferred. The colony is mildly pleased.
Logged. {crop} contract closed. Bonus paid. Don't spend it all on seeds.
buy_confirmed: Order placed. Delivery on next drop — Week {week}. Don't complain about the prices. I don't set them.

starting_buildings.note: All players start with a basic refinery pre-built

solar_array.name: Solar Array
solar_array.description: Cheap, reliable daytime power. Good starting option.

wind_turbine.name: Wind Turbine
wind_turbine.description: Steady output from lunar surface winds.

biofuel_generator.name: Biofuel Generator
biofuel_generator.description: Burns compost and moon dirt for power. No refined materials needed.

tiers.name: Harvest Drone Mk1
tiers.description: Basic harvester. Extracts moon dirt, ore, sand, or chemicals.

tiers.name: Harvest Drone Mk2
tiers.description: Improved harvester. More output, better power efficiency.

tiers.name: Harvest Drone Mk3
tiers.description: Advanced harvester. High output, highly power efficient.

grenades.name: Flashbang
grenades.description: Scatters and confuses fauna for 2 seconds.

grenades.name: Stun Grenade
grenades.description: Freezes fauna in place for 3 seconds.

grenades.name: Incendiary
grenades.description: Creates a burn zone for 5 seconds.

grenades.name: Bait Trap
grenades.description: Fauna cluster around it for 3 seconds.

grenade_bench.note: unlock_level on each grenade matches bench level needed

radio_tips.message: Colony Tip: Get some crops in the ground as soon as possible. Spacetatoes are slow but reliable. Terran Radishes are ready in one week if you need a fast first harvest.
Colony Tip: Check your harvest drones in Operations. Assign them to moon dirt, ore, sand, or chemicals — a balanced spread works well early on.
Colony Tip: If you have crops ready, head to the Relay and talk to Kovacs. Once the conversation is done, you can queue a shipment for Week 4's pickup window.
Colony Tip: Ship window is open this week. Head to Relay → Sell to queue your harvest. Kovacs will confirm the pickup.
Colony Tip: Compost from dead or cleared crops can be refined into Z Soil at the Refinery. Keep the composter running.
Colony Tip: Metals unlock a lot. Build a second dome when you can — more crops means more scrip per ship window.
Colony Tip: A raid is coming soon. Check your Defense Wall HP in the Habitat tab. Make sure you have a few grenades crafted.
⚠️ Colony Alert: Fauna activity detected in your sector. Defend your installation from the Dashboard when prompted.
Colony Tip: Drone efficiency matters more than drone count early on. One Mk2 drone outperforms two Mk1 drones on the same resource.
Colony Tip: Ship window this week. If you have contract crops in your silo, submit them at the Relay before shipping for bonus scrip.
Colony Tip: Consider upgrading your Water Purifier if your domes are running dry. More domes means more water demand.
Colony Broadcast: You've survived 20 weeks. The colony appreciates your continued supply. Keep it up out there.
